The '''''Acquisitor''''' was a [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class battleship]], more heavily armed than most battleships of its class at the time.

==History==
As with other Trade Federation combat ships, the ''Acquisitor''{{'s}} command crew included several [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidians]], one of whom was Commander [[Nap Lagard]]. Following the [[Dorvalla Incident|Incident at Dorvalla]], where it rescued the surviving crew and cargo of its sister ship, the ''[[Revenue]]'', command passed to [[Daultay Dofine/Legends|Daultay Dofine]].

After returning to [[Neimoidia/Legends|Neimoidia]], the ''Acquisitor'' hosted a military vehicle showcase by the representatives of [[Haor Chall Engineering/Legends|Haor Chall Engineering]] and [[Baktoid Armor Workshop/Legends|Baktoid Armor Workshop]], where the Trade Federation leadership agreed to purchase those war machines that would comprise the military force at the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]].

Later on, the ''Acquisitor'' was upgraded with additional weapons systems for service in the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy]] [[Confederate Navy/Legends|Navy]] and was painted with blue markings.

==Appearances==
*''[[Cloak of Deception]]'' {{1st}}
